name.description: App project name (also the apps/<name> folder). Default: catalog.

directory.description: Workspace-relative directory for the app. Default: apps/<name>.

base.description: Vite base path for static hosting (e.g. '/repo/' for GitHub Pages). Default: './' (works under any subpath).

dataProject.description: Nx project that owns the catalog data target.

dataTarget.description: Catalog data target name to depend on.
